description: This file defines the HomeScreen widget for a Flutter app, including the layout, state management, navigation, and UI components related to displaying and filtering a list of tales, as well as media player controls.

classes.name: HomeScreen
classes.description: A StatefulWidget representing the main home screen of the app, featuring a list of tales with filtering options, navigation to detail and player screens, and an admin access button.

classes.name: _HomeScreenState
classes.description: State class for HomeScreen handling the widget's state, including search query, loading/error states, and widget build logic.

classes.name: _FiltersRow
classes.description: StatelessWidget that displays category and age filters for tales, allowing users to filter displayed tales.

classes.name: _FilterChip
classes.description: Custom widget representing a selectable filter chip used within _FiltersRow.

classes.name: _TalesGrid
classes.description: Widget displaying a grid of tale cards or a message if no tales are available.

classes.name: _TaleCard
classes.description: Widget that visually represents a tale with its metadata and handles navigation to detailed views.

classes.name: _Badge
classes.description: Small widget for displaying category or age group labels on tale cards.

classes.name: _MiniPlayerBar
classes.description: Small media player control bar displayed at the bottom for the currently playing tale, offering playback controls and navigation to full player.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Releases resources held by the search TextEditingController.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the main UI of the home screen, including app bar, search/filter controls, tales grid, and mini player bar.

methods.name: onTap
methods.description: Callback to handle tap on a tale card, navigating to the tale's detail screen.

methods.name: onOpen
methods.description: Callback to open the full player screen from the mini player bar.
